# Autogenerated using znc-buildmod -v from net-irc/znc-1.10.2
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.13)
project(ExternalModules LANGUAGES CXX)
find_package(ZNC 1.10 HINTS /usr/share/znc REQUIRED)
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE true)

add_library(module_identserver MODULE identserver.cpp)
znc_setup_module(TARGET module_identserver NAME identserver)
target_link_libraries(module_identserver PRIVATE )

install (TARGETS module_identserver DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}/znc)
